subcodes.first_line: O My companions, render thanks unto the Lord of Mercy, for the light of proof shineth resplendently and the lamp of mystic knowledge gleameth bright, wafting a perfumed breeze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران من شکر حضرت رحمانرا که نور برهان ساطعست و شمع عرفان لامع نسیم عبیر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
